data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of offering tours in different languages. While the use case summary mentions Spanish and English options, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of these language options in the API or system. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not demonstrate that the system can effectively handle bookings in multiple languages.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of different language options for the tours.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add language support verification
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API supports multiple languages for tour bookings.
